# Digital Obstacle File sample fixture

This fixture contains 10 randomly sampled FAA DOF obstacle records copied from `tilemaker/raster-tilemaker/data/raw/Digital_Obstacle_File/`.

- Sampling seed: `1`
- Sample size: `10` records
- Files are organized by the original FAA archive state file names.

These files are committed so tests do not depend on the raw source data directory.
